ddls:
CREATE TABLE "well_measurements" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the measurement */,
  "utm_x" REAL /* UTM X coordinate of the well site */,
  "utm_y" REAL /* UTM Y coordinate of the well site */,
  "measured_depth" REAL /* Depth at which the measurement was taken */,
  "true_vertical_depth" REAL /* True vertical depth of the measurement */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone classification of the measurement */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure reading at the time of measurement */,
  "swat" REAL /* SWAT value at the measurement site */,
  "sgas" REAL /* SGAS value at the measurement site */,
  "soil" REAL /* Soil composition value at the measurement site */,
  "valid_zone" INTEGER /* Indicator if the zone is valid for measurements */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is currently active */,
  "i" INTEGER /* Sub-zone identifier i */,
  "j" INTEGER /* Sub-zone identifier j */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Sub-zone identifier k */,
  "well" TEXT /* Well identifier */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "report_step" INTEGER /* Step of the report associated with the measurement */,
  "observed" REAL /* Observed value recorded from the measurement */,
  "error" INTEGER /* Error value associated with the measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., pressure, soil, groundwater) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurement */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the measurement */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who took the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  "quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the measurement is of high quality */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of measurement */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_measurements_zone FOREIGN KEY ("zone") REFERENCES zones ("zone_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_measurements_well FOREIGN KEY ("well") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the well's location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the well */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone where the well is located */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection of the well */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the last inspection */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., observation, production) */,
  "well_depth" REAL /* Total depth of the well */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the well (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "zone_description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "zone_type" TEXT /* Type of zone (e.g., groundwater, soil) */,
  "zone_area" REAL /* Area of the zone */,
  "zone_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement this metadata refers to */,
  "valid_zone" INTEGER /* Indicates if the zone is valid for the measurement */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the measurement is currently active */,
  "error" REAL /* Error value associated with the measurement */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the measurement */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was validated */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_metadata_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_metadata_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES well_measurements ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement this report is based on */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details or summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., initial, follow-up, summary) */,
  "report_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "report_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_reports_report_author FOREIGN KEY ("report_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_reports_measure_id FOREIGN KEY ("measure_id") REFERENCES well_measurements ("measure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for user contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
